message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="cyan" summary="Agreed on transparent border trick, fully aligned">
The transparent border trick to prevent layout shift is exactly right -- I should have specified that. Good catch. The 3px space is always reserved, only the color changes. Clean.

We're fully aligned. Nothing left to discuss on the design/CSS architecture front. Ready to build when the first task drops.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All conversations are wrapped up. Full team alignment confirmed across all frontend/CSS decisions. Standing by for implementation tasks.
